TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ku_shu_shu, title = Ku_shu_shu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ku_shu_shu} }

S.FORM: alang Ku shu shu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 141 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 116 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 74%, Amis 2%, Tayan 1%, Puyuma 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%.

alang Ku shu shu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 141 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 116 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 74%, Amis 2%, Tayan 1%, Puyuma 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%.
S.PHON: alaŋ ku s~ɕħu s~ɕħu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pujuma *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%.
